answers.team: Lauren (founder/coach), one VA part-time, one contract closer
answers.ticket_tiers: General Admission $97; VIP $297 (includes hot-seat coaching + recordings); Inner Circle $997 (VIP plus a 90-day group container)
answers.backend_offer: 12-month 'Booming Business' coaching mastermind at $12,000 (or 4 payments of $3,500), pitched on day 2
answers.primary_objective: Sell 40 mastermind seats off the back of the summit; break even on ad spend from VIP/Inner Circle ticket sales
answers.secondary_goals: Grow the email list by 3,000 and build a warm retargeting pool for evergreen launches
answers.current_situation: She has a decent organic following (28k on Instagram) and a 9,000-person email list, but has never run paid ads. Funnel is a basic GHL opt-in page. No reminder automations. No pixel installed. Slides for the workshop are half done.
answers.whats_missing: Paid ads (never run them), reminder/confirmation automations, a real VSL, pixel + tracking, an upgraded registration funnel
answers.past_results: Ran one free webinar last year, 600 registered, 120 showed, sold 6 spots into a $2k offer with no ads, purely organic
answers.crm_platforms: GoHighLevel for everything; Stripe connected; ConvertKit being phased out
answers.budget: Willing to spend $8,000-$10,000 on ads for this launch
answers.ideal_buyer: Women coaches and service providers (life, health, business, relationship coaches) who are 2-5 years in, making $4k-$10k a month, but stuck on a referral roller-coaster
answers.location: United States and Canada, mostly suburban, plus a pocket in Australia
answers.income_or_stage: Business making $50k-$120k a year, wants to break $250k; mostly solopreneurs with maybe one VA
answers.number_one_problem: Inconsistent income. Some months $11k, some months $3k, and they never know which is coming.
answers.their_words: They say things like 'I'm so tired of the feast or famine,' 'I feel like I'm always hustling but never getting ahead,' and 'I know I'm good at what I do, so why am I still stressing about money?'
answers.customer_quotes: 1) 'I made $9k last month and $2,800 this month and I have no idea why. It's making me crazy.' 2) 'I'm scared to look at my Stripe dashboard on the 1st of the month.' 3) 'Everyone tells me to just raise my prices but I freeze every time I try.' 4) 'My husband keeps asking when this is going to become a real business and it crushes me.' 5) 'I have a waitlist one month and crickets the next.' 6) 'I'm doing all the things the gurus say and I'm still broke and exhausted.' 7) 'I don't want to be an influencer, I just want consistent clients.' 8) 'I've bought three courses and I'm still winging it.'
answers.what_they_want: Predictable $20k months, a simple system that doesn't require posting 5x a day, and to finally feel like a legit CEO instead of a stressed freelancer
answers.deeper_desire: To prove to themselves (and their spouse) that this is a real business, to stop trading hours for dollars, and to be the calm, confident woman who isn't checking her bank account in a panic
answers.top_objections: 1) 'I've bought programs before and they didn't work.' 2) 'I don't have time to add one more thing.' 3) 'I can't afford it right now' (which really means 'I don't believe it'll pay off'). 4) 'Paid ads feel scary and complicated.' 5) 'Will this work in MY niche?'
answers.objection_truth: Underneath it all they're afraid THEY are the problem, that they'll spend money and fail again and it'll confirm their worst fear that they're not cut out for this
answers.words_that_turn_them_off: 'Hustle,' 'grind,' 'six-figure secrets,' '10X,' anything bro-marketing, fake-scarcity countdown-timer energy, and 'easy/passive' overpromises
answers.words_that_resonate: 'Predictable,' 'sustainable,' 'calm,' 'consistent clients,' 'feel like a CEO,' 'without burning out'
answers.not_for: Brand-new coaches with no clients yet, and people looking for a get-rich-quick scheme
answers.platforms: Instagram (primary), Facebook groups for women entrepreneurs, some Pinterest, listens to podcasts during school pickup
answers.why_choose_you: Lauren went from $3k months to a $400k year using the exact calm, sustainable system she teaches, no ads-bro tactics; she's relatable and has 40+ documented client wins
answers.transformation: Go from feast-or-famine and constant hustle to predictable $20k+ months with a simple client-getting system, in 90 days
answers.social_proof: 40+ client testimonials, several screenshots of clients hitting their first $15k and $20k months, a flagship case study of a client who 3x'd her income in 5 months
